commit.message:
fix(site-dashboard): move Git Repo URL to its own full-width row

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add countdown widget

- New /countdown widget (src/countdown.html): counts down from a
  configurable start time, adds seconds on sub/donation events
- Each sub adds configurable seconds (default 60s)
- Each donation adds amount × donationSeconds seconds (default ×10)
- Timer persists in localStorage; ?reset clears it
- Gain bubble (+Xs) and donor name display on events
- Supports dark and glass themes
- Config page: new Countdown card with start time, per-sub seconds,
  per-dollar seconds, icon and label fields
- Config page: Copier and Reset URL buttons for /countdown
- nginx: added /countdown route

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix MatterStore link resolution bug, add functional scenario tests

Bug fix:
- getLinkedEntities() used raw entity ID instead of matter-namespaced
  composite key when looking up linked entities, causing all link
  lookups to silently return empty results

Tests (23 new tests across 2 files):
- tests/agent/functional-scenarios.test.ts: 8 scenarios covering
  matter intake, document review/tagging, deposition prep,
  cross-module search, matter isolation (security), deadline
  computation, invoice generation, and entity linking validation
- tests/web/frontend-scenarios.test.ts: 15 tests covering mock API
  chat responses, document content, data completeness, type
  consistency, and component wiring

All 484 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
ci: add PR checks workflow, pom.xml scaffold, and pipeline hardening

ci-cd.yml:
- Add concurrency group to cancel outdated runs on main
- Add Postgres 16 service container to build-test job
- Pass SPRING_DATASOURCE_* env vars to mvn verify
- Upload JaCoCo HTML report as artifact
- Add health-check polling after Render deploy hook (24 retries x 10s = 4min timeout)

New ci.yml (PR Checks):
- Triggers on PR to main and develop
- Job 1: build-test with Postgres + JaCoCo coverage enforcement
- Job 2: static-analysis with SpotBugs (findsecbugs) + OWASP dependency-check
- Concurrency group per PR number

pom.xml:
- Spring Boot 3.3.0 parent, Java 21
- Core deps: web, data-jpa, security, actuator, validation, postgresql, flyway
- MapStruct 1.5.5.Final + Lombok
- JaCoCo 0.8.12 with 70% LINE coverage threshold on BUNDLE
- SpotBugs 4.8.4.0 + findsecbugs 1.13.0 (effort Max)
- OWASP dependency-check 10.0.3 (fail on CVSS >= 7)

New required secret: RENDER_APP_URL (public Render service URL)
New optional secret: NVD_API_KEY (for faster OWASP NVD database sync)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ci): release-please auto-merge handles empty PR output + release 2.56.1

The auto-merge step used fromJSON() on potentially empty output,
causing 'Error reading JToken from JsonReader' when release-please
hits rate limits. Now uses jq with fallback.

Also bumps version to 2.56.1 (manual release since release-please
was rate-limited).

commit.message:
003 esp dsp equalization (#5)

* feat: add parametric equalizer via esp-dsp biquad chain

- Add espressif/esp-dsp dependency (idf_component.yml, CMakeLists.txt)
- Add EQFilterType enum, EQBandConfig struct, EQConfig to DeviceConfig (SCHEMA_VERSION=2)
- Implement EQProcessor: DRAM_ATTR static state, Audio EQ Cookbook peaking
  formula, dsps_biquad_sf32 stereo interleaved chain, lock-free coef updates
- Integrate EQProcessor into DMA audio loop (audio_capture.cpp)
- Persist 10-band EQ config via NVS blob with factory defaults
- Add REST API: GET/POST /api/eq, POST /api/eq/reset, GET /settings/eq
- Add EQ settings page to web UI (config_portal_html.h nav link)
- Mark all 29 tasks complete in specs/003-esp-dsp-equalization/tasks.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: add missing cstring include and restore HTTPServer::init signature

- config_schema.h: add #include <cstring> for strcmp in eq_filter_type_from_str
- http_server.cpp: restore missing 'bool HTTPServer::init(uint16_t, uint32_t)' signature
  (was accidentally dropped when inserting EQ settings page handler)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Updated deps

* fix: increase main task stack size 3584→8192 for EQ DeviceConfig growth

DeviceConfig grew by ~164 bytes after adding eq_bands[10] + eq_enabled.
Multiple DeviceConfig locals (main.cpp:97, mqtt_client.cpp:79/531) stacked
at call depth app_main→start_wifi_connected→mqtt_init caused overflow.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(shopping-agent): fix cart bugs and add completeness verification

- Fix remove_from_cart using fuzzy URL matching: pass cartEntryUid from
  add_to_cart response to delete cart entries precisely, avoiding
  accidental removal of wrong products with similar names

- Add verify_shopping_list tool: after shopping, the LLM can
  systematically check whether all items from the original list are in
  the cart; missing items are reported back for correction

- Add reminder gate in navigate_to_cart: active reminders are injected
  into the tool result, ensuring the LLM sees them before finishing

- Improve system prompt: clarify always_ask rule (never set
  autonomously), add retry/report rule for unfound items, document
  verify_shopping_list and cart_entry_uid usage

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: reconcile CronJob even when no pod uses the PVC

Previously, reconcileBackupResources returned early with NoPodFound
when no running pod had the PVC mounted, skipping the CronJob
reconciliation entirely. This prevented schedule/config changes from
being applied to existing CronJobs when the consumer pod was down.

Now the CronJob is always reconciled (created/updated) regardless of
pod presence. When no pod is found, node affinity is omitted (nil)
instead of setting an empty hostname, allowing the CronJob to run on
any node.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: preserve immutable fields via Rust resolver and version cluster class names (#956)

Move immutable field resolution from Python to a generic Rust module
that reads existing K8s resources before rebuilding topology variables.
This prevents CAPI from overwriting immutable fields during updates.

- Add ResourceFieldMappings<T> generic system with typed K8s lookups
- Add FieldMapping with jsonptr-based field extraction and label fallback
- Add kopium-generated OpenStackCluster CRD types
- Add compile-time git-describe via vergen-gix for cluster class naming
- Add compile-time assertion that VERGEN_GIT_DESCRIBE is non-empty
- Add PyO3 error boundary in driver.rs (create_exception + From<Error>)
- Add 15 unit tests for field resolution, 2 for cluster class naming
- Remove redundant Python integration tests covered by Rust tests
- Make rust_driver a required parameter in Cluster.__init__
- Update CI to use full git history for vergen-gix tag resolution

commit.message:
Universal agent primitives: search, read, write, link

Replaces the need for dozens of specialized tools with 4 composable
primitives that let the agent handle any lawyer workflow:

MatterStore (src/agent/matter-store.ts):
- Unified queryable store for all matter entities
- Matter-namespaced keys prevent cross-matter data access
- Full-text search across titles, content, and metadata
- Link validation ensures both endpoints exist in same matter
- Per-request isolation (no global singleton leaking across users)

Agent primitives:
- search_matter: full-text search across all entity types in a matter
- read_entity: get/list/get_links for any entity by type and ID
- write_entity: create or update any entity with type validation
- link_entities: typed bidirectional connections between entities

MCP server (src/mcp/litigation-server.ts):
- All 4 primitives registered as MCP tools alongside existing tools
- Any MCP client gets the same universal capabilities as the chat agent

System prompt updated to teach compose-from-primitives approach:
- Agent uses primitives for arbitrary workflows
- Specialized tools (conflicts, deadlines, Bates) kept for validated computation

Security fixes from GPT-5.4 review:
- Matter-namespaced entity keys in store
- Link validation (both endpoints must exist in same matter)
- Delete scoped to matter (won't remove other matters' links)
- Search metadata indexed for completeness

Agent module exports updated with new types and functions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- SQLite persistence for crash recovery
- Slash command helpers for /background start|list|status|cancel|pause|resume

Adds 25 tests covering registry CRUD, persistence, cron parsing,
webhook routing, background lifecycle, and slash commands.

feat: 3D IR Drop visualizer with educational V=IR annotations

- Single-plane wire mesh with dynamic voltage heatmap (auto-scales)
- V=IR path annotations: R × I = ΔV on each segment
- Flow particles showing current direction and intensity
- Wire hover tooltip with R, I, ΔV breakdown
- Visual legend explaining thickness, color, and particles
- Monotonic guided tutorial (steps 1→2→3→4)
- Click to activate/select, double-click to deactivate
- Wider text sprites with dark background pills for readability
- Fixed Svelte 5 reactivity: api as $state for proper effect tracking

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Spec Kit compatibility via dual-format summary extraction

bin/spec-index build now detects spec format by checking for the
'# Feature Specification:' title pattern (Spec Kit) vs OpenSpec's
opening paragraph before '---'. Spec Kit summaries are built from
the feature name + first User Story 1 plain-text sentence.

Tested against ai-demo-harness (3 Spec Kit specs) and dn-app
(56 OpenSpec specs) — both produce clean, useful summaries.

skills/shared/index-format.md: document the two extraction paths.
README: restore Spec Kit reference with accurate compatibility note.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: spec-contextualize
repository.description: Skills to help agents load only the specs relevant to a task, and keep a growing spec library healthy over time.

commit.message:
fix(input): bracketed paste + typeahead capture during streaming

Issue 1: Enable rustyline bracketed paste mode so pasted multi-line
text is inserted as a single buffer instead of triggering Enter on
each newline.

Issue 2: The raw-mode keyboard listener during streaming was consuming
all non-Esc keystrokes silently. Replace EscListenerGuard/spawn_esc_listener
with StreamInputGuard/spawn_stream_input which buffers printable
characters typed during AI streaming and exposes them via stop_and_take().
The main REPL loop now pre-fills readline with any typeahead text after
streaming ends. Also fixes Ctrl+C during streaming (was silently
swallowed before; now correctly triggers abort).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: browser automation, BugBot, and OTLP telemetry export

- caduceus-runtime: add browser.rs with BrowserService, BrowserAction,
  BrowserActionType, BrowserResult; shells out to playwright CLI via node
- caduceus-tools: add BrowserActionTool that wraps BrowserService and
  exposes browser_action in the tool registry (12 tools total)
- caduceus-orchestrator: add bugbot.rs with BugBot agent, BugBotFinding,
  BugBotReport, FindingSeverity, FindingCategory; review_diff/review_files/
  auto_fix methods; add /review and /telemetry slash commands
- caduceus-telemetry: add OtelExporter with export_metric/export_batch/flush,
  TelemetryEvent with Claude Code metric names (token.usage, cost.usage,
  session.count, tool.execution, active_time.total), OtelExporterConfig
  with CADUCEUS_ENABLE_TELEMETRY env var gate, SessionMetrics helper,
  simplified OTLP JSON payload builder; add reqwest dependency
- 30+ new tests across all three features

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Reorganize load test notebook: config in Cell 1, merge GitHub deploy

- Cell 1: All config parameters (endpoint, dataset, users, pauses, replica)
- Cell 2: Setup (install whl, load queries/users, get token)
- Cell 3: GitHub deploy (disabled, merged into single cell)
- Cell 4: Run load test
- Cell 5: Telemetry report
- QUERIES_PER_BATCH default changed to 1 (single query scenario)

commit.message:
fix(ci): include Cargo.lock for security audit

The security audit job requires Cargo.lock to check for known
vulnerabilities. Libraries should track Cargo.lock when they have
CI that depends on it.
